query: SELECT tc.id, tc.organizationId, tc.taskKey, tc.status, tc.notionLastEdited, tc.updatedAt, tc.createdAt FROM taskCompletion tc WHERE tc.taskKey = 'hl7:adt' ORDER BY tc.updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5
